violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Chemicals were stored above the prep sink in the kitchen. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the banquet hall, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The bottom shelf of the prep table in the kitchen was not in good repair. Kitchen equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The floors in the banquet bar area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per interview of PIC, establishment has designated an employee to be registered with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. In the process of filling out the application. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the shelvings in the back silverware storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. -Shelving observed chafed and chipped. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register the ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Blade of slicer observed chipped. -Staff placed the slicer out of commission during this inspection. Establishment shall not use the slicer until blade has been repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the shelvings in the back silverware storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. -Wood shelving observed chafed and chipped. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machines, the fans, areas underneath/behind all kitchen equipment and areas underneath/behind all equipment in the back ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

The walls in the 2 bay sink area are constructed of sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
